request: Feature page + homepage teaser for the standup skill on the marketing site: a dedicated /standup feature page (site-src/standup.njk, docs.njk-layout peer of memory.njk/swarm.njk, TOC + new hero-symbol SVG) with the real /standup terminal readout as proof-by-demonstration; a compact homepage teaser section in site-src/index.njk between 'How it flows' and 'Adoption' linking to it; nav wiring in _data/nav.json + _includes/footer.njk; and a standup catalog entry on site-src/skills/core.njk. Persuasion: authority-via-competence + liking-via-shared-pain + demonstration (no scarcity/urgency). Copy is Article X.1-bound (lowercase, em-dash-free, no fluff). UI surfaces under site-src/** (tdd.ui_globs) → design-ui→impeccable at TDD Step 6, prose→copywriting for copy.
